---
subtitle: "Writing & Valorization"
title: "Day 2 - Block 6"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D2 B6"
---

## Objective

- Evaluate outputs with evidence-first rubric
- Draft adoption memo with governance controls
- Produce resilience protocol (E8)

## Inputs

- Two model outputs to score
- Shared scoring rubric
- Governance memo template

## Evaluation flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Two outputs] --> B[Blind scoring]
  B --> C[Disagreement log]
  C --> D[Evidence re-check]
  D --> E[Adoption memo]
  E --> F[Personal verification protocol]
```

## LLM usage documentation template

```markdown
## Model Information
- Model:
- Provider:
- Date:
- Temperature:

## Usage Purpose
- Drafting / coding / retrieval

## Verification
- Checks performed:
- Remaining uncertainty:
```

## Uncertainty standard

- Ask for explicit confidence level
- Require one uncertainty explanation
- Reject confident claims without evidence

## Adoption decision contract

- `owner`
- `audit_rate`
- `stop_rule`
- one explicit `do_not_delegate` boundary

## Hands-on (E7 + E8)

- E7: score two outputs + memo
- E8: personal verification protocol
- Submissions: `/docs/live-exercises?exercise=E7`, `/docs/live-exercises?exercise=E8`

## Deliverable

- E7 scored comparison + memo
- E8 personal verification protocol
- One explicit do-not-delegate rule

## Timebox

- 20 min lecture input
- 30 min group build
- 10 min debrief

## Evaluation rubric

- Scoring consistency and evidence use
- Adoption memo decision quality
- Verification protocol practicality

## Extension task (optional)

- Add peer challenge to memo
- Revise governance stop rule

## Resource anchors

- R017, R055
- R043/R046, R040, R025

## Debrief

- Where did raters disagree and why?
- Which governance control is non-negotiable?
- What is your personal stop rule?
